CVE-2020-27511.title: An issue was discovered in the stripTags and unescapeHTML compone ...
CVE-2020-27511.summary: An issue was discovered in the stripTags and unescapeHTML components in Prototype 1.7.3 where an attacker can cause a Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDOS) through stripping crafted HTML tags.

CVE-2020-7993.title: Prototype 1.6.0.1 allows remote authenticated users to forge tick ...
CVE-2020-7993.summary: Prototype 1.6.0.1 allows remote authenticated users to forge ticket creation (on behalf of other user accounts) via a modified email ID field.
